9:T1e59,<div class="question">
<p>An object is sliding from rest down a frictionless inclined plane. The object slides 1.0 m during the first second.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"/></p>
<p>What distance will the object slide during the next second?</p>
<p>A.  1.0 m</p>
<p>B.  2.0 m</p>
<p>C.  3.0 m</p>
<p>D.  4.9 m</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/2/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","2"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.SL.TZ2.5"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","2-1-motion"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$9"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>C</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>The correct response, option C was the most popular chosen at HL but at SL significantly more candidates chose options A or B. The difficulty index of 21 and discrimination index of 0.27 at SL indicates that students found the question to be hard with lower discrimination between stronger and weaker candidates. It is felt that those who chose option A did not realise the block was accelerating down the slope, whereas those choosing B did but were unable to calculate the acceleration correctly.</p>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
